name: Bryn Loftness
position2: M-Sense Research Group (Wake Forest School of Medicine)
bio: Bryn Loftness is a PhD candidate in Complex Systems and Data Science at UVM building multimodal digital phenotyping tools for pediatric mental health, and the founder of Biobe, a translational spinout focused on family-facing measurement. She also helped launched VALI (https://vermontcomplexsystems.org/projects/vali/) at VSCI.
